name: add_attachments
trigger_description:
Use this tool when:
The user asks to attach files to an existing draft.
The user wants to include attachments before sending a draft.
A draft has already been created and attachments must be added separately.

Do not use this tool when:
Creating a new draft (use create_draft).
Editing body, subject, or recipients (use update_draft).
Sending the email (use send_draft).
No draft exists yet.

Ask the user to clarify which files to attach if attachment references are not explicit.
